summary: The South Bay closed out March and kicked into April with a venture funding blitz: AI heavyweights like Rhoda AI (Palo Alto) and Mind Robotics (Palo Alto) each topped $500M, while chip designers SiFive (Santa Clara) and hardware innovators like Frore Systems (San Jose) secured major rounds. Most of the region's active tech firms are hiring, suggesting confidence despite broader market caution.
